notes: Fase D uses IPA Terpadu; no standalone Kimia subject nodes in SMP. Chemistry starts as a standalone subject at Fase E/F SMA.
Atomic nodes are curated from official CP/ATP summaries and uploaded seed files; prerequisites are inferred for graph traversal and should be teacher-reviewed before production.
Added SD/MI Phase A/B/C nodes for Matematika and IPAS/IPA SD. SD science is modeled as subject='ipas' with label 'IPAS (IPA SD)' and bridged to SMP subject='ipa' / IPA Terpadu.
Fase A IPAS/IPA nodes are marked as bridge/readiness nodes and require teacher review because official references vary between IPAS phase listings and target CP emphasis.
No standalone SD physics/chemistry/biology subjects are added; those remain embedded in IPAS/IPA SD.
